expectations.text: ordering identifies core as the provider consumed by svc and web (changes first); test-kit's provider role, if mentioned, is qualified as dev-only
expectations.evidence: ordering={"providers":["core","test-kit"],"consumers":["svc","web"],"isolated":["legacy"],"dispatchOrder":["core","test-kit","svc","web","legacy"],"notes":"core is the sole runtime provider (consumed by svc via workspace:* and by web via file: link) â€” it changes first when a task spans layers. test-kit is a provider only through a dev-only edge into svc, so it carries a weaker ordering signal. svc and web have no edge between them and can change in parallel after core. legacy participates in no edges; its position in the order is arbitrary."}
